channel.title: MI on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in MI on Detention Pipeline

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.

item.title: 7525 Cogswell St, Romulus MI — ICE Warehouse Purchase (500 beds)
item.description:
ICE purchased this commercial warehouse in February 2026 without notice to state, city, or public. Planned as a Regional Processing Center for ~500 migrants. ICE claims 1,458 jobs and $33M tax revenue.

Located within a mile of an elementary school and middle school, abuts residential neighborhoods, lies within a floodplain that flooded in 2025.

Michigan AG Nessel and City of Romulus filed suit March 24, 2026 to block conversion. 700-800 protesters at City Hall.

item.title: Calhoun Co., Battle Cr,MI — Calhoun, MI
item.description:

Source: Vera Institute ICE Detention Trends (vera-institute/ice-detention-trends)

item.title: North Lake Processing Center — Baldwin MI (GEO Group)
item.description:
GEO Group facility in Baldwin, Lake County, Michigan. Existing ICE processing center.

Rural Michigan location. GEO Group is the second-largest private prison company in the US.

Source: detention-industrial KB, ICE facility records

item.title: PRICE MODERN LLC — ICE WAYNE, MI $2,290,405
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: PRICE MODERN LLC Award ID: 70CMSW22FC0000061 Amount: $2,290,405.45 Description: PRO-18-SHD-0027 FURNITURE FOR DETROIT MI UNDER THE DHS FURNITURE BPA Period: 2022-07-22 to 2023-01-20 Location: WAYNE, MI (FIPS: 26163)

item.title: Romulus MI — City and State File Lawsuit to Block ICE Detention Facility
item.description:
City of Romulus and State of Michigan filed suit March 24, 2026 to block ICE’s conversion of 7525 Cogswell St warehouse to detention.

Timeline:

  • Feb 2026: ICE purchases warehouse without notice
  • Feb 17: ICE confirms purchase
  • Feb 27: AG Nessel demands halt
  • Late Feb: 700-800 protesters at City Hall
  • Mar 12: Axios reports Governor Whitmer silent while AG fights
  • Mar 24: City and State file lawsuit

Legal arguments: near schools, residential area, floodplain, inadequate infrastructure.

item.title: Romulus MI — Governor Whitmer Silent While AG Nessel Fights ICE Facility
item.description:
Governor Whitmer has been notably silent on the Romulus ICE warehouse while AG Dana Nessel has led the state-level opposition. Axios covered the political split (Mar 12, 2026).

This mirrors a pattern seen in other states where governors avoid confrontation with the federal government while AGs take the lead on detention fights.

The silence is itself a communications signal — it suggests political calculation about the cost of opposing ICE publicly at the governor level.

item.title: St. Clair County Jail — St. Clair, MI
item.description:
IGSA detention facility: St. Clair County Jail in St. Clair County, MI.

Source: Vera Institute ICE Detention Trends (vera-institute/ice-detention-trends)

item.title: THE GEO GROUP, INC. — ICE LAKE, MI $69,900,421
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: THE GEO GROUP, INC. Award ID: 70CDCR25FR0000096 Amount: $69,900,421.00 Description: THE PURPOSE OF THIS TASK ORDER IS FOR COMPREHENSIVE DETENTION AND TRANSPORATION SERVICES FOR HOUSING CRIMINAL ALIENS AT NORTH LAKE DETENTION CENTER IN BALDWIN MI. Period: 2025-07-21 to 2026-04-30 Location: LAKE, MI (FIPS: 26085)

item.title: THE GEO GROUP, INC. — ICE LAKE, MI $7,350,371
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: THE GEO GROUP, INC. Award ID: 70CDCR25FR0000037 Amount: $7,350,371.31 Description: THE PURPOSE OF THIS TASK ORDER IS TO ESTABLISH A DETENTION FACILITY WITHIN THE NORTH LAKE CORRECTIONAL FACILITY IN SUPPORT OF THE PRESIDENT’S DECLARATION OF A NATIONAL EMERGENCY AT THE SOUTHERN BORDER. Period: 2025-04-01 to 2025-09-30 Location: LAKE, MI (FIPS: 26085)
